pricing.title: Pricing | ProInsights — review management software
pricing.description: Simple monthly pricing for hotel and restaurant review intelligence. Hotel tiers from €79/month. Restaurant tiers tailored. Multi-property 20% off.
pricing.h1: Pricing built for hospitality operators, not enterprise procurement
pricing.intro: Four hotel tiers. Restaurant pricing tailored to your group. No setup fees. Cancel anytime. 30-day money-back if there's no value in the first month.
pricing.body_html:
Hotel pricing

Four tiers, transparent monthly pricing.

Published rates. Multi-property discount: 20% off second and subsequent properties (e.g. Pro €189 → €151).

Basic

€79/mo

Daily intelligence on your own venue. Entry tier for independent properties.

  • Daily morning report
  • 6 review portals (Booking, TripAdvisor, Google, Trip.com, ZenHotels, Expedia)
  • Sentiment per review
  • Themes auto-detected
  • 1 email recipient
Start with Basic

Advanced

€139/mo

For operators who need weekly + monthly views and want to track 5 competitors.

  • Everything in Basic
  • Up to 5 email recipients
  • Weekly report (Monday 8am)
  • Monthly management report
  • 5 competitors tracked daily
  • Competitive monthly deep-dive
Choose Advanced

Pro

€189/mo

Full daily intelligence stack. AI reply drafts. WhatsApp summary. 1★ urgent alerts.

  • Everything in Advanced
  • WhatsApp morning summary (+€10/mo per extra phone)
  • Unlimited email recipients
  • 10 competitors tracked daily
  • AI-drafted owner replies in your house voice
  • B&B and HB rate comparison
  • 1★ urgent alert (WhatsApp + email within 90 minutes during operating hours)
  • Sensitive-claim auto-escalation
Choose Pro

Expert

€249/mo

Strategic. Room-rate market analysis, daily competitor review monitoring, weekly strengths & weaknesses brief.

  • Everything in Pro
  • Room-rate market analysis (up to 6 competitors, room-category match, demand-day pricing patterns, parity violations)
  • Daily competitor review monitoring (every new review at every tracked competitor, sentiment + themes)
  • Strengths & weaknesses analysis (weekly)
  • Quarterly competitive deep-dive briefing
Choose Expert

Restaurant & Business pricing

Tailored pricing for restaurants and hospitality groups.

Restaurant pricing depends on number of venues, competitor set size, and which sources you need monitored (Google + TripAdvisor at minimum; Booking.com + Facebook on request). Email hello@proinsights.com.cy with your venue list and we'll come back with a clean monthly number within one business day.

Business (spas, dental clinics, lawyers, retail, gyms, anyone with a Google Business Profile): three tiers — Basic, Advanced, Pro — tailored to your venue count.

Terms

Standard terms across every tier.

  • All tiers include everything below them within the same vertical.
  • Data refreshed daily.
  • Cancel anytime — no notice period required.
  • No setup fee.
  • First report within 24 hours of signature.
  • 30-day money-back guarantee — if there's no value at 30 days, you cancel and pay nothing.
  • Multi-property: 20% off the published rate for the second and every subsequent property.

faq.a: No. Every tier is monthly, cancel anytime. We onboard you in a 15-minute call, you hand us your Google and TripAdvisor pages, and your first daily report lands within 24 hours.

faq.q: What if it doesn't work for our hotel?
faq.a: You get the first 30 days money-back. If there's no value at the 30-day mark, cancel — no questions, no exit fee. We'd rather lose a month of revenue than have an unhappy customer.

faq.q: How does the multi-property discount work?
faq.a: Your first property is at the published rate. Every subsequent property is 20% off. So a 3-hotel group on Pro pays €189 + €151 + €151 = €491/month total.

faq.q: What's included in Pro vs Expert for hotels?
faq.a: Pro gives you the full daily intelligence stack — AI replies, WhatsApp, 1★ alerts, 10 competitors. Expert adds room-rate market analysis (BAR comparisons by room category + demand day), daily competitor review monitoring (every new review at every tracked competitor), and a weekly strengths/weaknesses brief. Expert makes sense for properties that compete on rate, not just service.

faq.q: Do restaurants get the same tiers?
faq.a: Restaurants get three tiers — Basic, Advanced, Pro. There's no Expert tier because the headline Expert feature (room-rate market analysis) doesn't apply to restaurants. Restaurant pricing is tailored to your venue count — email us with the list.

faq.q: Can I add WhatsApp to my Basic plan?
faq.a: WhatsApp morning summary is a Pro+ feature because it requires the AI brief layer to work well. If you specifically need WhatsApp on a smaller plan, email us — we'll find something.
